title: Education (Names of Teachers Suspended from the Register) Regulations, 2002
title_en: Education (Names of Teachers Suspended from the Register) Regulations, 2002

provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content: These regulations may be cited as the Education (Names of Teachers Suspended from the Register) Regulations.

provisions.title: Interpretation
provisions.content: In these Regulations, unless the context otherwise requires— " the Act " means the Education Act 1 ; 1 Cap. 353 " Commissioner " shall have the same meaning as ascribed to it under the Act ; " register " means any of the registers maintained in accordance with the provisions of section 50 of the Act ; " service " means the teachers service; " service post " shall have the same meaning as ascribed to it under the Teachers' Service Commission Regulations; " suspension " means temporary or definite removal of the teacher's name from the Register of Teachers.

provisions.title: Grounds for suspension
provisions.content: The Commissioner may suspend a teacher from the Register of Teachers— (a) on the teacher being suspended from the service post in accordance to regulation 31 of the Teachers Service Commission Regulations, 1990; (b) on the teacher's dismissal from the service post without termination of membership of the service in accordance to regulation 27 of the Teachers Service Commission Regulations; (c) on the teacher's voluntary resignation from the service post before he is confirmed in his appointment or while the teacher is bound under any agreement; and (d) if due to some mental or physical incapacity, the Medical Board has certified in writing that the teacher is not fit to continue with or pursue teaching duties in accordance to Regulation 47(3) of the Teachers' Service Commission Regulations.

provisions.title: Prohibition on teaching
provisions.content: Any teacher whose name has been suspended from the Register of Teachers shall be deemed to be an unauthorised person to teach any secular subject in any school as long as the suspension order is in force.

provisions.title: Offences
provisions.content: Any person who contravenes the provision of these Regulations commits an offence and the provision of section 59 of the Education Act 2 shall apply mutatis mutandis to such a person as if references to subparagraph (g) of that section were references to the person permitting a teacher whose name has been suspended from the Register of Teachers to teach any secular subject in any school. 2 Cap. 353

provisions.title: Revocation
provisions.content: [Revokes the National Education (Suspension of Names of Teachers from the Register of Teachers) Regulations 3 .] 3 G.N.
